ResurFXAventura, FL

Non-ablative fractional laser for skin resurfacing, scars, stretch marks, and texture improvement.

Duration

30–45 min

Downtime

1–3 days redness

Results

2–4 weeks progressive

Sessions

3–5 sessions

About ResurFX in Aventura, FL

ResurFX is a revolutionary non-ablative fractional laser that stimulates your skin's natural healing process to rebuild collagen from within. Unlike ablative lasers, ResurFX treats the deeper layers of skin while leaving the surface intact, resulting in faster healing and less downtime. It's the ideal solution for acne scars, surgical scars, stretch marks, fine lines, and overall skin texture improvement.

Key Benefits

Reduces acne scars and surgical scars
Improves stretch marks
Smooths fine lines and wrinkles
Refines skin texture and pore size
Minimal downtime (1–3 days redness)
Safe for most skin types

Treatment Areas

Full FaceNeckAbdomenThighsArms

Real Results

Real Before & After Results

See the transformative results our clients achieve with ResurFX fractional laser treatments

BeforeAfter

Acne Scars — Cheeks

Before

Visible pitted acne scars, rough texture, uneven skin surface

After

Significantly smoother skin with reduced scarring after 4 sessions

BeforeAfter

Stretch Marks — Abdomen

Before

Visible white and red stretch marks from pregnancy or weight changes

After

Dramatically faded stretch marks with improved skin texture after 5 sessions

BeforeAfter

Fine Lines — Eyes & Forehead

Before

Visible fine lines, uneven texture, early signs of aging around eyes

After

Smoother, more refined skin with reduced wrinkles and improved elasticity

The Process

Your ResurFX Journey

What to expect during your skin resurfacing treatment

1

1. Consultation

We assess your skin concerns, discuss goals, and create a customized treatment plan tailored to your needs.

2

2. Preparation

Topical numbing cream is applied 30 minutes before treatment for maximum comfort during the procedure.

3

3. Treatment

The ResurFX handpiece delivers precise fractional laser energy to stimulate deep collagen remodeling.

4

4. Recovery

Mild redness for 1–3 days. You can return to normal activities immediately with mineral sunscreen.

5

5. Results

Collagen rebuilds over 2–6 months. Each session builds on the last for progressive, dramatic improvement.
